provenance.source_corpus: Prescribed Fire Increases Seedling Recruitment in a Natural Pitch Pine (Pinus rigida) Population at its Northern Range Limit

source_spans.text: prescribed fire results in the greatest increase in pitch pine seedling recruitment compared to mechanical or no treatment.
only fire had a significant positive effect on recruitment.
Percent canopy cover significantly decreased following both the fire (df = 95, P < 0.0001) and mechanical treatments (df = 95, P < 0.0001; Figure 4).
depth to mineral soil decreased significantly in the fire treatment (df = 95, P = 0.013) but not in the mechanical treatment (df = 95, P = 0.149; Figure 6).
